photobooth.description: Korean-style photo booth rental with our custom software. Ideal for Events, Weddings, Product Launches.

showcase.heading: Our Portfolio
showcase.description: Sample projects we have developed for our clients
showcase.project0_desc: Back-office management system and sales reporting
showcase.project1_desc: Queue booking app for clinics and shops
showcase.project0_detail: A complete photobooth software solution designed to handle events of all sizes, from small gatherings to large corporate events.
showcase.project0_features: Automated photo capture, Frame & Filter management, Sales reporting, Instant photo printing, Multi-channel payments, Back-office dashboard
showcase.project1_detail: A back-office system that enables teams to manage sales data, reports and analytics efficiently, directly connected to the photobooth system with real-time data display.
showcase.project1_features: Real-time dashboard, Daily/monthly sales reports, User management, Export to Excel/PDF, Smart notifications, Data backup system
showcase.project2_detail: An enterprise hub platform consolidating task management, HR, and organizational resources into one place.
showcase.project2_features: Task management, HR & Leave management, Internal chat, Document management, Performance reporting, Single Sign-On
showcase.project3_detail: A full-featured online sales platform supporting both B2C and B2B with product management, inventory, order handling, and secure payment processing.
showcase.project3_features: Advanced product management, Shopping cart & payments, Order management, Promotions system, Sales reports, Product reviews
